title: Flint Required
description: Adds a lightweight, lore-friendly flint toolset and small primitive items to expand early-game crafting without unbalancing progression.
body:
## **What is it**

FlintRequired adds flint tool heads and complete flint tools (axe, hoe, knife, pickaxe, shovel) plus supporting items such as flint shards, plant fiber and a crude brush. All items come with intuitive crafting recipes designed for early-game use and compatibility with vanilla survival progression.

## **Key Features**

New flint tool heads and finished flint tools with tool models and textures.
Support items: flint shards, plant fiber, crude brush.
Simple, craftable recipes that fit vanilla-style progression.
Small datapack-style recipe set for compatibility with other mods and packs.

## **Why use it**

Expands early-game options.
Lightweight and focused.
Ideal for packs that want primitive crafting depth or a flint-focused theme.

Wiki: [Athi's Workshop Wiki](https://athlantes.github.io/AthisWiki/mods/flint_required/overview/)
